scripts.format: prettier --write src scripts tests .github ARCHITECTURE.md DEVELOPMENT.md docs package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.web.json .prettierrc.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src scripts tests .github ARCHITECTURE.md DEVELOPMENT.md docs package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.web.json .prettierrc.json
scripts.verify:1a: bun run build && bun run smoke && bun run tests/iteration-1a/verify.ts
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run check:boundaries && bun run test && bun run verify:1a
